description: EC2NodeClassStatus contains the resolved state of the EC2NodeClass

amis.description: AMI contains the current AMI values that are available to the cluster under the AMI selectors.

instanceProfile.description: InstanceProfile contains the resolved instance profile for the role

securityGroups.description: SecurityGroups contains the current Security Groups values that are available to the cluster under the SecurityGroups selectors.

subnets.description: Subnets contains the current Subnet values that are available to the cluster under the subnet selectors.
